items.title: Trading Aaron Wiggins and Isiah Joe (both ~$10M/year contracts) just saved OKC nearly $200M on their tax bill for this season.
items.author: ffinstructor
items.body_excerpt: People don’t realize the implications of the luxury tax on rosters and how predatory the payment schedule becomes once over the threshold. Each tier heavily impacts your tax bill. EDIT: Actual figures Aaron Wiggins - $9.2 M Isiah Joe - $11.3 M Luxury Tax Bill Pre-Trades: $296 M…

items.title: The Pistons pick up a stellar wing shooter for Cade Cunningham -- Joe averaged 11.1 points in 21.2 minutes per game while shooting 42.3% on six 3-point attempts -- and the Thunder have now accumulated four second-round picks in separate trades of Joe and Aaron Wiggins.
items.author: Shams Charania Tweets
items.body_excerpt: The Pistons pick up a stellar wing shooter for Cade Cunningham -- Joe averaged 11.1 points in 21.2 minutes per game while shooting 42.3% on six 3-point attempts -- and the Thunder have now accumulated four second-round picks in separate trades of Joe and Aaron Wiggins.
